mapper.sql: id, building_id, name, sort_no, status, deleted, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO building_unit ( building_id, name, sort_no, status, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{buildingId}, #{name}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE building_unit SET building_id = #{buildingId}, name = #{name}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE building_unit SET status = #{status}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE building_unit SET deleted = 1, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM building_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM building_unit WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM building_unit WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
